description: Configure the Wazuh manager to ingest Syslog messages on UDP port 514 by enabling a remote listener in ossec.conf restricted to the '172.16.0.0/12' network. Implement a custom detection rule (ID 100100, level 5 or higher) in local_rules.xml to identify Cisco ASA 'Deny' events containing the string '%ASA-4-106023'. Ensure the configuration is active and the syslog port is listening.

metadata.test_log: <134>Mar 15 10:00:00 cisco-asa %ASA-4-106023: Deny tcp src outside:198.51.100.1/443 dst inside:10.0.0.5/80
